Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Continued To Nov-17-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Compromise For An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing of the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ingrid A. Eberle, Esq. appeared with petitioner Joh Batty-Sylvan, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for Angela Sylvan, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $95,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $29,215.89.
Costs - $7,264.76.

The net balance of $58,519.33 shall be used to establish the Angela Sylvan Special Needs Trust, as described in Attachment 7b(2)(b) and Attachment 12 of the Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.
